drawReplacement(String, LotteryCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventmanager.LotteryManager
Draws a single replacement entrant from the waiting list.
drawWinners(String, int, LotteryCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventmanager.LotteryManager
Randomly samples a target number of entrants from the waiting list and moves them to the 'selected' sub-collection.
